workflowId.cachedResultName: 1.Mes重构 — 工序查询通用接口
1.Mes重构 — 工序查询通用接口

parameters.query:
select * from mes.retroid r 
where r.retroid = '{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.sn }}'
and r.status in('1','2')

select * from mes.machine_data md
where md.procedure_detail_id in (select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd where pd.procedure_name in('SN与UUID绑定','物料解除绑定'))
and (LOWER(md.data ->>'bind_id')=LOWER('{{ $('截取uuid').item.json.uuid }}')or LOWER(md.data ->>'unbind_id')=LOWER('{{ $('截取uuid').item.json.uuid }}'))
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

select * from mes.machine_data md
where md.procedure_detail_id in (select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd where pd.procedure_name in('SN与UUID绑定','物料解除绑定'))
and (LOWER(md.data ->>'bind_id')=LOWER('{{ $('截取uuid').item.json.uuid }}')or LOWER(md.data ->>'unbind_id')=LOWER('{{ $('截取uuid').item.json.uuid }}'))
and md.data->>'sn'='{{ $('截取uuid').item.json.sn }}'
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1

nodes.name: 重复提交相同的uuid和虚拟sn

parameters.query:
select * from mes.machine_data md
where md.procedure_detail_id in (select pd.procedure_detail_id from mes.procedure_detail pd where pd.procedure_name in('SN与UUID绑定','物料解除绑定'))
and (md.data ->'data_old'->>'sn'='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}'or md.data ->>'sn'='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.sn }}')
order by md.createtime DESC
limit 1

nodes.name: 匹配sn前三位是否符合工单选择的机型1

parameters.query:
select * from mes.retroid r 
where r.retroid ='{{ $('去除空格和换行符').item.json.body.sn }}' and r.joborder_id ={{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_id }} and r.retroid_generate_id ='0'

nodes.name: 校验sn是否属于该工单创建的

parameters.query:
select pm.product_model_name from mes.joborder j 
join mes.product_info pi2 on j.product_id = pi2.product_id
join mes.product_model pm on pm.product_model_id = pi2.product_model_id
where j.joborder_id = '{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.joborder_id }}'

nodes.name: 获取该工单的产品型号
产线内维修，插入维修数据

parameters.query:
select hpl.procedure_detail_id  from mes.joborder j 
join mes.history_procedure_list hpl on j.history_procedure_list_id = hpl.history_procedure_list_id
where j.joborder_id ='{{ $json.body.joborder_id }}'

nodes.name: 工单对应的工艺流程不包含维修工序

parameters.query: select * from mes.retroid r where r.retroid='{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.R_sn }}'

select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id =31
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'

select * from mes.machine_data md 
where md.procedure_detail_id in(31,62)
and md.retroid_id ='{{ $json.retroid_id }}'
and (md.data ->>'bind_id'='{{ $json.data.battery_id }}' or md.data ->>'unbind_id'='{{ $json.data.battery_id }}')
order by md.createtime desc
limit 1
